overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character canoeing through a misty river environment. The character paddles through foggy waters, navigates around rock formations, beaches the canoe on a pebble shore, and disembarks to walk into the forested area.

events.description: character climbs into canoe and begins paddling forward through the misty water

agents.ego_description: paddling canoe steadily through calm misty waters, heading downriver with consistent strokes

entered.detail: long wooden canoe with character seated inside paddling
wooden paddle dipping into water on alternating sides
calm dark water surface with ripples trailing behind the canoe
dense deciduous trees lining the left riverbank
dense deciduous trees lining the right riverbank
thick gray mist hanging low over the water reducing distant visibility

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character entering a wooden canoe on a misty river. The camera follows from behind as the character paddles through calm waters, with dense forest lining both banks and thick fog obscuring the distant river view.

events.description: character steers canoe to the right to navigate around large rocks emerging from the water
character completes maneuver around rocks and resumes straight course downriver

agents.ego_description: navigating canoe around rock formations by paddling harder on one side, then resuming steady forward paddling

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders emerging from the river water creating obstacles

segments.scene_description: The character paddles through a section of the river containing large rock formations. The canoe maneuvers around the moss-covered boulders with careful steering strokes, while the forested banks draw closer on both sides of the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river approach to pebble beach

events.description: water becomes visibly shallower revealing stones beneath as canoe approaches the shore
canoe beaches onto the sloping pebble shore and comes to a gradual stop

agents.ego_description: paddling toward the riverbank and slowing down as water shallows, then sliding the canoe onto the pebble beach

entered.detail: sloping shore covered in smooth rounded stones and gravel
fallen tree trunks and branches accumulated along the water edge
clear shallow water revealing rocky riverbed beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The canoe approaches a pebble beach on the right bank, moving through increasingly shallow and clear water. Driftwood logs line the left shore as the character paddles the canoe onto the gravel beach and comes to a stop.

events.description: character stands up from the canoe and steps out onto the pebble shore
character transitions from water travel to walking on land, moving away from the beached canoe

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the beached canoe and walking up the pebble shore into the forested riverbank area

entered.detail: wooden canoe resting on the pebble shore at the water's edge
grass and small shrubs covering the riverbank above the pebble line

segments.scene_description: The character disembarks from the beached canoe and walks away from the river onto the pebble shore. The camera follows from behind as the character moves into the forested area, leaving the canoe behind on the beach and heading inland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty river voyage to a trek into a dense inland forest. It begins with the character paddling a wooden canoe through calm, fog-shrouded waters flanked by thick woods. As the canoe maneuvers around moss-covered boulders and large rock formations, the forested banks draw closer, narrowing the river's path. The scene then shifts as the water becomes shallow and clear, leading the canoe past driftwood logs and onto a gravel beach. Finally, the character disembarks from the vessel and walks away from the river, moving across the pebble shore and disappearing into the surrounding forest.
